mapper.select: select count(*) from vaccine_appointment where date_format(appointment_date, '%Y-%m-%d') = date_format(now(), '%Y-%m-%d')
select count(*) from vaccine_appointment where status = #{status}
select status, count(*) as count from vaccine_appointment group by status order by status
select count(*) from vaccine_appointment where date_format(appointment_date, '%Y-%m-%d') = #{dateStr}
select v.name as name, count(a.id) as count from vaccine_appointment a left join vaccine_information v on a.vaccine_id = v.id group by a.vaccine_id, v.name order by count desc limit 5
select time_slot, count(*) as count from vaccine_appointment group by time_slot order by time_slot
